name: trimemh
install_doc: bun install -g trimemh && trimemh install (auto-detects agents) OR trimemh install --target claude-code --with-hooks
notes: MCP server providing a local-first, governance-first agent memory system with a 4-stage compression pipeline (ContentRouter → type-specific compression → CacheAligner → CCR). Claims 93% token reduction. ContentRouter dispatches by content type: TypeScript/code → AST signatures only (bodies deferred), logs → variable normalization + dedup, JSON → schema-only, diffs → filenames + change counts, prose → 3-level reversible sentence compression (CCR). CacheAligner wraps output in a fixed XML skeleton to stabilise the KV-cache prefix across turns — explicitly cache-SAFE design. Full originals stored locally in SQLite; agent fetches on demand via memory_retrieve. Cross-agent: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Continue, Windsurf, Copilot CLI, Aider. Hooks available (--with-hooks flag). Includes 5 skills (using-trimemh, remember, recall, handoff, session-history) and 7 .claude/commands. Novel: governance RBAC + stale-memory detection (flags removed symbols/changed fingerprints before agent reads stale context).

mcp.description: MCP server exposing tools: memory_context, memory_search, memory_retrieve, memory_propose, memory_feedback, memory_session_close, memory_code_impact, memory_stats
